calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-08-2010 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-08-2010 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Aug-16-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Reiss for Nelda Myers. Jacob Harker for Ferne Van Deusen.

The Court noted that the accounting by Mr. Harker was filed on August 10, 2010 and that the issue as to the former Agent (Power of Attorney) is still in dispute. Mr. Reiss stated that one asset was left off of the accounting, that he spoke to Counsel about it and that they may not have an objection. Counsel discussed the matter and agreed to set a trial date in November. The remaining issues on the Petition for Relief Pursuant to Probate Code 4541 and Section 4231 and any objections to the accounting petition were referred to the Department of the Presiding Judge (206) for trial setting (order for the same signed in open Court).

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.

PETITION Petition For Relief Pursant To Probate Code Sec 4541 And Sec 4231
Off Calendar Aug-16-2010 Text Ruling

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Accounting By Ferne Van Deusen
Off Calendar Aug-16-2010 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Jun-07-2010 Continued To Aug-16-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Accounting By Ferne Van Deusen
Off Calendar Jun-28-2010 Continued To Aug-16-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Riess for Nelda Myers. Jacob Harker for Ferne VanDeusen (Respondent).

Mr. Reiss requested the matter be continued for status in August and setting of an evidentiary hearing on that date. The matter was continued to August 16, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The amended account is to be filed by end of business August 10, 2010.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

PETITION Petition For Relief Pursant To Probate Code Sec 4541 And Sec 4231
Off Calendar Jun-28-2010 Continued To Aug-16-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Accounting By Ferne Van Deusen
Off Calendar Jun-07-2010 Continued To Jun-28-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jacob Harker for Ferne Van Deusen. Steven Riess for Nelda Meyers.

The Court stated that the accounting does not comply with Probate Code 1062 and that it wanted to see an amended account. Today's matters were continued to June 28, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of the amended account. The July 20, 2010 hearing date on the accounting petition was continued to August 16, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

PETITION Petition For Relief Pursant To Probate Code Sec 4541 And Sec 4231
Off Calendar Jun-07-2010 Continued To Jun-28-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
